summary: Added fractal recursive geometry generator with two strategies (faceSubdivision producing crystalline forms via iterative triangle midpoint displacement, branchingGrowth producing organic tree/coral structures via iterative branching with seeded angles). Output uses Float32Array positions/edges/randoms compatible with existing geometry pipeline. Recursion depth adapts to quality tier via maxFractalDepth (low=3, medium=4, high=6). Both strategies use iterative traversal with explicit stacks to prevent stack overflow. Hard caps on points (50k) and edges (30k), depth clamped to [3,6], output normalized to radius 2.5, all coordinates validated finite. All 30 new tests pass alongside existing suite.
